summary: Implemented the V2 decision-first daily email frontstage from the provided mockup and owner correction notes: Chinese plain-text plus responsive HTML alternative, exact YYYYMMDD -- Project Name -- arXiv Group -- Theme subject contract, first-screen read/skim/skip cues without numeric x/5 foreground scoring, hidden backend ROI and Claim Ledger foreground details, q-fin candidate pollution filtering, optional Release-hosted MP4 link card, feedback actions, and SMTP evidence hashes only.
scope: frontstage regression tests for subject/body score suppression
non_scope: no new SMTP send in this code-change commit
no direct GitHub Release upload outside the controlled manual workflow
model_delta: Added MOD-ADP-037 adp-email-decision-ui-v2 and refreshed MOD-ADP-034 to adp-manual-delivery-test-v1.4 because manual delivery now consumes the V2 email frontstage.
formula_delta: Added FORM-ADP-039 and refreshed FORM-ADP-008, FORM-ADP-018, FORM-ADP-034, and FORM-ADP-036 fingerprints after lesson, SMTP, global-scan, video frontstage, and subject-contract changes.
parameter_delta: Refreshed PARAM-ADP-186 and added PARAM-ADP-276 through PARAM-ADP-279 for HTML alternative, plain-text length cap, q-fin candidate filter, and lesson frontstage requirement.
tests_run: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_v2_rebase_focus PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_notifications.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_lesson.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_global_scan.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_video.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_scheduled_execution.py -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_v2_rebase_all PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s arxiv-daily-push/tests -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_v2_rebase_root PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests/governance -p 'test_*.py' -q
parameter_registry.csv and TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.csv width parse checks

rollback: Revert version 0.14.1 email decision UI V2 code, tests, schema updates, phase record, manifest, event, and governance records, then restore version 0.14.0.
risks: The V2 frontstage still needs PR CI, merge to main, and a controlled manual workflow_dispatch to prove the next real Gmail email renders as intended.
Scheduled production remains disabled until the owner separately approves production variables.
